title: Donut Go Crazy for Cream-Filled Treats!
story: Every September 14, donut lovers across America celebrate National Cream-Filled Donut Day by biting into their favorite fluffy, creamy treats! Bakeries and donut shops go all out, offering special deals on Boston cream, jelly-filled, and custard donuts. Some people try to eat as many different cream-filled varieties as possible, while others post photos of their gooey, delicious bites on social media. Many families make it a tradition to visit their local donut shop together or even try making homemade cream-filled donuts. It's the perfect excuse to indulge in these sweet, messy, and absolutely irresistible treats!
activity_question: What do many people post on social media during National Cream-Filled Donut Day?
activity_choices: Photos of their cream-filled donut bites
activity_answer: Photos of their cream-filled donut bites
follow_up_question: What's the messiest cream-filled donut you've ever tried to eat?

title: Hoagie Heroes Unite for Sandwich Glory!
story: Every September 14, sandwich lovers across America celebrate National Eat a Hoagie Day by biting into these massive, delicious subs! A hoagie is a long sandwich stuffed with meats, cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, and other tasty toppings, all piled high on a crusty roll. People visit their favorite delis, make hoagies at home, or share photos of their creations online. Some cities even hold hoagie-eating contests or offer special deals at sandwich shops to mark this tasty holiday!
activity_question: What makes a hoagie different from other sandwiches?
activity_choices: It's served on a long, crusty roll
It only has cheese on it
activity_answer: It's served on a long, crusty roll
bonus_fact: The word "hoagie" comes from Philadelphia, where Italian workers called "hoggies" ate these sandwiches for lunch!

title: Get Creative and Show It Off!
story: Every September 14, people celebrate National Live Creative Day by sharing their artistic talents with the world! This special day encourages everyone to step out of their comfort zone and show off their creativity. People paint murals in public spaces, perform music on street corners, dance in parks, and share their artwork online. Some folks try something completely new like pottery or poetry, while others dust off old hobbies they haven't touched in years. The whole point is to live creatively and inspire others to do the same. Social media fills up with videos of people singing, drawing, crafting, and creating all sorts of amazing things on this day!
activity_question: What do people do on National Live Creative Day?
activity_choices: Share their artistic talents with others
Only create art indoors by themselves
activity_answer: Share their artistic talents with others
follow_up_question: What creative activity would you try if you weren't afraid of making mistakes?
